title: Minecraft, but if you touch grass you die
description: A very simple datapack/mod that will rapidly kill those who come in contact with grass.
body:
The premise of this datapack is quite simple. Upon touching grass, you will begin to die very rappidly. Upon first loading into a new world, the challange will not be yet initiated. ![The message that appears in chat](https://gamingbarn.net/images/download_page/gd/description/images/message.png) The challange can be started by any player by either clicking the message in chat, or by running the command: /trigger start_game Once the button has been clicked or command has been ran the game will begin in 10 seconds. Once the challange begins, all players will get a platform to stand on. One player's platform will be made out of bedrock and will be the world spawn point. ![The bedrock platform that it set as the world spawn](https://gamingbarn.net/images/download_page/gd/description/images/platform.png) Upon a player's death, they will get 10 seconds until the challenge resumes for them > [![SparkedHost Promotional Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d880ee51aed06a8b0de318249c81b079793a8a8.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2775) > Want a Minecraft server? Consider SparkedHost! Use code GAMINGBARN for 25% off! > [![Discord Promotional Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6dc9d56feee16e94cb60cccde0087803114ac61.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg](https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg)) >
***https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg***
